apiContracts.description: Returns current metrics including total request count and server uptime in seconds

componentSpecs.name: IMetricsRepository
componentSpecs.description: Repository interface for reading and writing metrics counters in the database. Exposes getRequestCount, incrementRequestCount, getUptimeSeconds, and resetCounters.

componentSpecs.name: MetricsRepository
componentSpecs.description: Postgres-backed implementation of IMetricsRepository using the shared pool from src/shared/db/connection.ts. Reads/writes a key-value metrics table with rows for 'request_count' and 'uptime_start'.

componentSpecs.name: IMetricsService
componentSpecs.description: Service interface for the metrics module. Exposes getMetrics (returns MetricsResponse) and resetMetrics (resets counters and returns fresh MetricsResponse).
